[et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.24.0″ _module_preset=”default” custom_padding=”35px||60px||false|false” border_width_top=”1px” border_color_top=”#2B59C0″ border_color_bottom=”#2b59c0″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row column_structure=”1_2,1_2″ use_custom_gutter=”on” make_equal=”on” _builder_version=”4.24.0″ _module_preset=”default” max_width=”1110px” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_gallery gallery_ids=”3889,3888″ fullwidth=”on” _builder_version=”4.24.0″ _module_preset=”default” auto=”on” auto_speed=”3000″ locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_gallery][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.24.0″ _module_preset=”default” custom_padding=”16px||||false|false” custom_padding_tablet=”0px||||false|false” custom_padding_phone=”0px||||false|false” custom_padding_last_edited=”on|tablet” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.24.0″ _module_preset=”default” text_font=”Gruppo|700|||||||” text_font_size=”21px” header_font=”Gruppo|600||on|||||” header_text_align=”left” header_text_color=”#232323″ header_font_size=”25px” header_line_height=”1.3em” header_2_font=”Gruppo|700|||||||” header_2_font_size=”35px” header_4_font=”Oswald|700||on|||||” header_4_text_align=”center” header_4_text_color=”#171a25″ header_4_font_size=”40px” header_4_letter_spacing=”-0.2px” min_height=”28px” custom_margin=”16px||19px|||” header_2_font_size_tablet=”35px” header_2_font_size_phone=”25px” header_2_font_size_last_edited=”on|phone” header_4_font_size_tablet=”” header_4_font_size_phone=”30px” header_4_font_size_last_edited=”on|phone” locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”]

FLOW RUCKSACK

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.24.0″ _module_preset=”default” custom_margin=”||14px|||” hover_enabled=”0″ global_colors_info=”{}” sticky_enabled=”0″]

The Flow Rucksack is made in 3 different sizes to accommodate your equipment in the best possible way. Functionality and ergonomics were merged together to offer a comfortable rucksack distribute the load comfortably. We used a combination of different long-lasting and durable materials, yet light and robust. Each size was specifically designed to accommodate our range of gliders.

MEDIUM – 100 L

  • Fits lightweight or hammock-style harnesses only.
  • Weight: 940g

LARGE – 130 L

  • Fits all open harnesses and XC pod harness, except for fully dedicated comp harnesses.
  • Weight: 1045g

X-LARGE – 170 L

  • Designed to fit comp harnesses or a tandem kit.
  • Weight: 1190g

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
